results.justification: Topological divergence metrics on attention graphs share the same topological-defect attention-head diagnostic family.
Topological aspects of language model representations overlaps with per-head winding-number signature concept.
Per-layer persistent homology shares the topology-as-diagnostic paradigm with per-head winding deviation.
Clustered attention heads share the per-head vocabulary + region specialization concept.
Per-head entropy diagnostic shares the per-head topological deviation diagnostic family.
TDA in NLP survey covers the broad topological-defect attention-diagnostic paradigm.
Per-head function characterization review covers the per-head specialization vocabulary concept.
Cross-layer attention-consistency diagnostic shares per-head winding-deviation detector concept.
